title: The strong maximal function on a nilpotent group
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
An analogue of the strong maximal function of Jessen, Marcinkiewicz, and Zygmund is shown to be bounded on 

  
    
      
        L
        p
      
    
    {L^p}
  

, for all 

  
    
      p
      >
      1
    
    p > 1
  

, on a nilpotent Lie group.
